description: End-to-end integration fixture for the Bazel CDB-generation path. A tiny MODULE.bazel workspace with a cc_binary that compiles greeter.cpp + main.cpp against greeter.hpp; BazelAqueryGenerator runs 'bazel aquery' with CODEBOARDING_CPP_GENERATE_CDB=1, emits .codeboarding/cdb/compile_commands.json, and clangd drives the StaticAnalyzer the same way compile_flags.txt does elsewhere.
